seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Releasing strong open-source models drives billions in brand value, widespread hosting, API/subscription revenue, and user data for iterative improvement; DeepSeek example at $50B+ valuation.
Enabling persistent memory allows ChatGPT to retain key context from prior chats, enabling better research and personalized outputs when combined with tools like Sol.
Best-in-class routing across specialized models (e.g., Sonnet/Kimi for medium agentic, Sol/Fable for hard) in a single interface like ChatLLM improves performance on diverse tasks.
Combining model intuition with automated verification in computation-mixture loops enables deeper problem-solving on tasks where verification is feasible.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Evaluating full agent trajectories (plans, tool calls, handoffs) rather than single final outputs prevents shipping broken agents due to intermediate failures.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Kimi K3 outperforms nerfed US models (Fable/Sol) at discovering cybersecurity issues, highlighting competitive impacts of model restrictions.
near_misses.reason: Relevant commentary but lacks specific technical details or new tools/frameworks.

notes: Very limited high-signal technical content in the past 24 hours from seeds or global search; most posts are commentary or non-technical. Focused on clearest actionable insights around memory, routing, and evaluation patterns.
